summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that she has written her first book review for the New York Times. The review covers two books about Virtual Reality by Jeremy Bailenson and Jaron Lanier. The post itself contains no substantive analysis, serving only as a pointer to the external review.
key_points: O'Neil wrote her first NYT book review
The review covers two VR books by Bailenson and Lanier
The post is essentially a link announcement with no substantive content
money_quotes: I just wrote my first book review for the New York Times.
key_insight: This is a simple announcement post directing readers to an external book review, with no substantive content to analyze.
